scope: apps/web/src/App.tsx monthly contribution UI and authenticated API calls
apps/web/src/monthly-contribution.ts helper contracts for cycle month, strategy, status, API base normalization, and currency formatting
apps/web/src/App.test.tsx executable helper assertions, including local timezone cycle month, invalid month, invalid currency, and API base normalization
apps/web/src/styles.css responsive layout and visible focus states
deterministic collector signals for frontend behavior, portfolio-scoped list loading, local Headers construction, i18n, and large component size
residualRisk: Approved with notes: independent review initially found two blocking issues, UTC month derivation and report generation before cycle confirmation. Both were patched and re-reviewed. Remaining deterministic signals are accepted for this MVP: strategy/status contracts are mirrored in the web helper instead of shared package imports, portfolio-scoped lists are loaded without a new pagination contract, and App.tsx remains a large component. No i18n system exists in the repo, so hardcoded Portuguese UI copy is not blocking for this PR. No financial advice, order flow, or broker automation was introduced.
